title: DISM interaction diagram
description: Generates a generic Mermaid sequence diagram of a DISM session (DismApi → Manager → Provider Store → imaging providers) from a dism.log.

sections.name: DismDiagram
sections.description: Emit a sequence diagram from DISM session milestone lines

rules.name: emit-dism-sequence
rules.match: Starting DismApi\.dll session|Successfully loaded the ImageSession|Successfully created the local image session and provider store|does not support CreateDismImage on|DismShutdownInternal
